---

## Notes for the next phase (`api-contract-diff`)

- All call sites were extracted by scanning `.ts/.tsx/.js/.mjs` files inside the ported `frontend/` (excluding `node_modules`, `.next`, `test-results`).
- The configured axios instance lives in `lib/axios.ts` (`api`). All `api.<verb>(...)` calls resolve via that instance's `baseURL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:8000/api'`.
- `fetch(...)` callers prepend their own `API_URL` (often `${API_URL}/api/...`); `API_URL` is `process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` in those files.
- Template-literal endpoints (backticks with `${...}`) are listed verbatim — resolve by reading the file context.
- Echo / Pusher / Reverb call sites cover realtime channels and the broadcasting auth endpoint; they are not REST endpoints.
